MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF HUSKIES LESSEE LLC'S Motion For Order Granting Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
